name: midwifery
positive: The midwife monitored contractions throughout the labor.
A calm voice guided the mother through each stage.
The newborn was placed gently on the mother's chest.
Vital signs were checked every fifteen minutes.
Warm water eased the discomfort of early labor.
The midwife had attended hundreds of home births.
Breathing techniques helped manage the pain of contractions.
The umbilical cord was clamped shortly after delivery.
negative: The coach monitored progress throughout the training camp.
A calm voice guided the team through each drill.
The trophy was placed gently on the winning team's table.
Statistics were checked every fifteen minutes.
Cold water eased the discomfort of the intense workout.
The coach had attended hundreds of championship games.
Breathing techniques helped manage the fatigue of the sprint.
The final whistle blew shortly after the winning goal.
